## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added/updated; `npm test` is green locally.
- [ ] `npm run lint` is clean.
- [ ] If this adds/changes an agent's paths or frontmatter, I cited the official source.
- [ ] Source files stay under ~350 lines.
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or the agent matrix changed (README / docs/).
